generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [

]

    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted

]

]

]

    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle direction"
]

]

]

]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

instance LiDARPointCloudsData : DTDFVocab:Data [

]

]

]

]

]

]

]

]

]

    base:desc "Automotive context implementation of ISO 23247 RA with case-based generalization for requirements"

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) and steering commands from the digital twin to the physical twin's motor and steering actuators, with end-to-end latency <= 100 ms."
]

]
